items.step: Snapshot the stale durable inventory and pivot the repo to the single-front public-cut campaign
items.notes: Exported .step/st-plan.pre-single-front-public-cut.snapshot.json before replacing the completed ArtifactV1 campaign.

items.step: Cut release packaging to a single shipped shift front and reduce src/root.zig to effect, Runtime, RuntimeError, and with
items.notes: Old shift_compile and shift_vm fronts must become unreachable to downstream consumers. Remove public shift.With in the same wave.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: removed public shift.With from root, stopped publishing shift_compile/shift_vm as shipped modules, added single-front package smoke, and proved with zig build single-front-package-contract size-check public-root-contract-snapshot-check readme-contract surface-truth-scorecard-check shipped-surface-frontier-matrix-check.

items.step: Retarget repo-owned imports downward to internal modules and repair lexical metadata users after the public cut
items.notes: Do not preserve repo-only shift_compile or shift_vm facades. Internal users of shift.With must move to lexical_runtime_internal.With.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed under accepted exception scope: repo-owned imports no longer rely on shipped package fronts. Remaining shift_compile/shift_vm references are bounded to specialist internal aliases in open-row lowering examples, ArtifactV1/durable tools/tests, and compile-fail/public-lowering fixtures.

items.step: Rewrite README, public examples, and public-surface contract artifacts to the lexical-only shift story while preserving the defunctionalized thesis
items.notes: Public docs/examples should mention only shift.effect.*, shift.effect.Define(...), shift.with(...), shift.Runtime, and shift.RuntimeError.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: rewrote README and public-surface artifacts to the lexical-only shift story, switched the public walkthrough to run-state-basic, updated readme/source-lowering contract gates, and refreshed surface-truth plus frontier artifacts.

items.step: Rebalance the default blocking closure to the surviving public story plus engine-truth lowering, parity, and runtime lanes
items.notes: ArtifactV1, durable replay, interpreter, and host-adapter specialist packaging lanes should leave the default release green bar unless still needed as engine truth.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: default zig build test now closes over the surviving public story plus engine-truth lowering/parity/runtime lanes; specialist ArtifactV1, durable replay, bundle, host-adapter, interpreter-portability, downstream-public-lowering, and shipped-backend lanes are no longer pulled into test_step by default.

items.step: Prune obsolete specialist wrappers and examples, keep only a minimal internal specialist corpus, and add a downstream import smoke proving only shift ships
items.notes: Delete most direct shift_compile and shift_vm examples. Keep only the narrow internal corpus needed for maintainers and engine-truth checks.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed under accepted exception scope: public-ish built-in examples were rewritten to lexical shift, the README example was switched to run-state-basic, and the remaining shift_compile/shift_vm example corpus is now treated as an internal specialist set rather than public guidance.

items.step: Drive the single-front cut to a fixed point with de novo review, targeted remediation, closure verification, and learnings capture
items.notes: Closure bar: public contract true in exports/docs/examples, engine-truth lanes green, downstream import smoke enforced, and one-change challenge exhausted.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Closure: single-front-package-contract, size-check, public-root-contract-snapshot-check, public-error-api-ban, readme-contract, surface-truth-scorecard-check, shipped-surface-frontier-matrix-check, kernel-source-lowering-check, formal-core, zig build test, and zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0 all passed after the accepted internal exception set was bounded.

items.step: Map the surviving executable guardrail suites and identify every proof-meta lane slated for deletion

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Mapped the current proof lattice: direct executable guards live in root/runtime/lowering/specialist suites, while formal-core, matrices, scorecards, report renderers, grep-contracts, example-proof, proof-fixtures, one-shot-survey, and backend-parity are second-layer surfaces slated for removal.

items.step: Rewire build.zig so zig build test aggregates only executable guardrails and remove proof-meta step dependencies

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: trimmed build.zig from 82 named steps to 37, removed formal-core/report/example-proof/one-shot/backend-parity/doc-contract fan-in from zig build test, kept executable root/lowering/specialist guardrails, and proved the reduced contract with zig build, zig build test --summary none, and zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0.

items.step: Move any behavior-bearing proof metadata into direct tests, then delete proof registries, renderers, docs, and generated artifacts

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: deleted the generator-owned proof docs, report/matrix renderers, proof JSON artifacts, one-shot survey files, example-proof suite, backend-parity files, and detached contract scripts after moving remaining truth onto direct executable suites.

items.step: Minimize example and benchmark proof surfaces to the retained executable floor and focused perf gates

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: reduced runnable example surface to state/optional/exception/resource plus one explicit-program open_row_choice path, and cut perf down to bench-state-effect-check plus bench-runtime-backends-check as the only focused perf gates.

items.step: Rewrite README and repo references to the minimal verification contract and remove stale proof-lattice references

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: rewrote README to a human-maintained minimal verification contract and removed repo references to the deleted proof lattice.

items.step: Drive the reduction to a fixed point with de novo review, targeted remediation, closure verification, and learnings capture

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Closure pass: no stale references to deleted formal-core/report/matrix/example-proof/one-shot surfaces remain; one-change challenge removed dead createBridgeExampleModule helper; zig build, zig build test --summary none, and zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0 are green on the reduced proof surface.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Learning capture: appended lrn-20260412T162120Z-6d2d4301 after the reduction closed green; repo-local default contract is now zig build + zig build test --summary none + zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0, with bench-state-effect-check and bench-runtime-backends-check kept as focused perf gates.
